allow: Bash(node -e "const s=require\('sharp'\); s\('public/images/athletics/ethan-schiffman.webp'\).metadata\(\).then\(m=>console.log\('current schiff webp:', m.width,'x',m.height,'  bytes:', m.size\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('sharp'\).then\(async \({default: sharp}\) => { const fs = require\('fs'\); const dir = 'public/images/new-user-setup'; for \(const f of fs.readdirSync\(dir\)\) { const m = await sharp\(dir + '/' + f\).metadata\(\); console.log\(f, m.width + 'x' + m.height\); } }\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('sharp'\).then\(async \({default: sharp}\) => { const fs = require\('fs'\); for \(const f of ['hba-logo-color.webp', 'hba-logo-round.webp']\) { const m = await sharp\('public/images/brand/' + f\).metadata\(\); console.log\(f, m.width + 'x' + m.height\); } }\);")
